summary: Completed frontend testing of Settings Navigation Integration Pack. All features working correctly: Control Center page renders with Quick Settings card and 4 control cards, Settings Hub shows NEW badge with gold highlight in sidebar, all navigation links work properly.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed duplicate /admin/settings-hub entry in AdminLayout.js navItems array (was causing React duplicate key warning)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings Navigation Integration Pack fully tested. Control Center page at /admin/control-center shows Quick Settings card with 4 shortcuts and 4 control cards with Open buttons. Settings Hub in sidebar has gold highlight (#D4A843) with NEW badge when not active.

/admin/control-center page renders.details: Page title 'Admin Control Center' displays, Quick Settings card present, 4 control cards present

Admin sidebar Settings Hub with NEW badg.details: Settings Hub link has gold highlight styling (bg-[#D4A843]/20 text-[#D4A843]) and NEW badge when not active

Admin sidebar Control Center link.details: Control Center link visible in sidebar with data-testid='nav-control-center'

Quick Settings card shortcuts.details: All 4 shortcuts present and link to /admin/settings-hub with hash anchors

Control Center 4 cards.details: All 4 cards present with descriptions and Open buttons

Open button navigation.details: Open buttons correctly navigate to respective pages

Settings Hub highlight styling.details: Gold background (#D4A843/20) and gold text (#D4A843) applied when not active

duplicate_settings_hub_entry.issue: Duplicate /admin/settings-hub entry in navItems array (lines 20 and 88) causing React duplicate key warning
